_README: STRUCTURED single source of truth for the provenance-tag taxonomy. Human doc: ../references/provenance-tags.md. The grep-friendly regex provenance_tags.re is GENERATED from this file by gen_provenance_re.py and must match byte-for-byte (test_provenance_tags.py enforces it). Consumers LOAD this (bash via jq/python; python via json) or LOAD the generated .re — they never re-state the head list. 'in_re' controls whether a head appears in the generated .re (the global-hook projection): heads with in_re=false are part of the vocabulary but DELIBERATELY excluded from the hook until an owner approves widening it. 'class' (source|epistemic|status|grade) is the structured axis the KG-fold maps to a source_tier; it does not affect matching.
